signals.headline: Iran Reopens Strait of Hormuz to Commercial Vessels Amid US Blockade and Ceasefire Optimism | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Reopens Strait of Hormuz to Commercial Vessels Amid US Blockade and Ceasefire Optimism | YES | MED confidence**

Iran announced on April 17, 2026, that the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open" to commercial shipping, linking the move to a US-brokered ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, signaling potential resumption of oil flows through this critical route.[1][4] US President Trump confirm
matched_markets: US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?

signals.headline: ETH Hits $6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[2]
signals.raw:
ETH Hits $6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[2]

Ethereum's price has surged to $6,000 as of April 18, 2026, driven by confirmation that the **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** has entered its final testing phase, enhancing wallet abstraction and validator efficiency[2]. Spot Ethereum ETF inflows have hit all-time highs, boosting institutional deman
